page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor. It features 28 dedicated physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with 1 thread per core. The system is equipped with 112.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a bundled 472 GB SSD, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 5 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear division between single-core and multi-core or GPU-driven capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core and single-threaded compression tests scoring in the bottom 10% and 25% respectively. However, multi-core performance is average, supported by a 40 MB L3 cache. The standout performance lies in LLM inference; prompt processing for both 135M and 7B models reaches top-tier status, and text generation for a 7B model also ranks in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth and database operations consistently perform in the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance leverages older-generation hardware, specifically the Intel Broadwell CPU and NVIDIA Pascal GPU architectures, to offer dedicated GPU resources without the premium of current-generation accelerators. It is best suited for workloads such as medium-scale LLM inference, machine learning model evaluation, and parallel processing tasks that can offload computation to the GPU while utilizing the 28 dedicated CPU cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 cores, 112.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it includes a 472 GB local SSD and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While single-core CPU benchmarks are weak, the instance delivers average multi-core performance and top-tier results in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation for medium-sized models. This hardware profile makes it a cost-effective choice for GPU-accelerated workloads, machine learning inference, and parallel data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 28 Intel Xeon cores, 112 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge features 28 Intel Xeon cores, 112 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU for accelerated machine learning workloads.
tagline: A dedicated GPU-accelerated server featuring an NVIDIA P100 GPU and 28 Intel Xeon cores for parallel computing and LLM inference.
bullet_points: 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores
1x NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM
112 GB system memory and 472 GB local SSD storage
Top-tier prompt processing and text generation for medium LLMs
Optimized for machine learning inference and parallel processing
